description: Backend Power Features: Priority Engine, Smart Scheduling, and Subtask Decomposition. Create the PriorityAgent, enhance SchedulerAgent with suggest_time/focus actions, enhance PlannerAgent with decompose action, update orchestrator routing, add GET /api/priorities endpoint, register new agent in main.py, and add tests.
steps: Create backend/app/agents/priority.py - PriorityAgent inheriting AgentBase. Use generate() to rank tasks by urgency x importance. Fetch tasks via call_mcp_tool('google-tasks','list_tasks') and events via call_mcp_tool('google-calendar','list_events'). Return prioritized list with emoji indicators (red/yellow/green). Consider deadline proximity, meeting prep, user profile priorities.
Add GET /api/priorities endpoint in backend/app/main.py that authenticates via auth_token query param, calls PriorityAgent.execute(), and returns the ranked task list.
Register PriorityAgent in main.py lifespan (import and instantiate with mcp_client).

Enhance backend/app/agents/scheduler.py: add a 'suggest_time' action to SCHEDULER_PROMPT. When user says 'find me time for X' or 'when should I work on X', find free slots using find_free_slots MCP tool, consider user work_hours from profile (via get_user_context), prefer mornings for focus, avoid post-meeting slots. Return suggestion with option to confirm and block time. Also add 'focus_session' action: when user says 'start a focus session for N minutes on X', create a 'Focus Time' calendar event blocking that duration.

Enhance backend/app/agents/planner.py: add a 'decompose' action to PLANNER_PROMPT. When user says 'break down X' or 'decompose' or 'split into steps' or 'help me plan X', use Gemini to decompose into 3-5 actionable subtasks (max 6). Create each subtask via MCP. Return formatted list with time estimates.

Update SYSTEM_PROMPT in backend/app/agents/orchestrator.py: add 'priority' agent to available agents list. Add routing rules: 'what should I focus on' / 'prioritize' / 'most important' / 'what matters' -> priority agent. Add routing: 'break down' / 'decompose' / 'split into steps' -> planner. Add routing: 'focus mode' / 'start focus' / 'deep work' / 'pomodoro' / 'focus session' -> scheduler with focus_session instruction. Add routing: 'find me time for' / 'when should I work on' -> scheduler with suggest_time instruction. Update _status_for() in orchestrator to include 'priority' agent.

Add tests in backend/tests/test_agents.py: TestPriorityAgent class testing priority ranking logic (mock tasks with various deadlines, verify ordering). Test smart scheduling suggestion (mock free slots, verify morning preference). Test subtask decomposition (mock Gemini returning >6 subtasks, verify truncation to max 6). Test focus session (verify calendar event creation).
acceptance_criteria: python3.11 -c 'import app.main' succeeds with no errors
python3.11 -m pytest tests/ -v passes all existing 119 tests plus new tests
PriorityAgent returns prioritized task list with urgency indicators
Scheduler handles 'find me time for X' with smart slot suggestions
Scheduler handles 'start focus session' by creating calendar block
Planner handles 'break down X' by decomposing into max 6 subtasks
findings: All 128 tests pass (119 existing + 9 new). Python 3.11 requires pyenv path setup: export PATH=$HOME/.pyenv/versions/3.11.15/bin:$PATH. pip install -r requirements.txt needed for module imports. The user_context import was added to scheduler.py for the suggest_time feature. The decompose action enforces max 6 subtasks by truncating the Gemini response.
